note: Live pull via Zapier MCP from Claude Code session 2026-05-11. Updated from 5/7 base with new threads. Key new: NetCom call Thu 5/14; AccuWeather meeting window may have lapsed (McCormack proposed Mon 9am-noon PT); NASCAR Verwholt wants times this week; NESN now awaiting substantive v7 reply (Peter committed to 'next week' on 5/7).

emails.subject: EverPass/NASCAR follow up

emails.subject: DIRECTV/EverPass NFL Sunday Ticket - Revised Proposal
emails.snippet: Hi Alex, In the spirit of partnership and with a shared focus on delivering value to DIRECTV's extensive commercial customer base, please find attached our revised proposal for distribution of NFL Sunday Ticket.

emails.subject: Re: EverPass x WBD Partnership
emails.snippet: Ryan, Every new distribution relationship we've entered has required a technical questionnaire before we even spend resources negotiating terms.
